description: CompositionPurple sleeveless top made of knitted, blended polyester fabric, has a cut out at the back with a bow detailFitRegularWash careRinse separatelyGentle handwash in mild detergentDo not bleach or scrub on embroidery & printLine dry inside outLow ironThe crush-worthy, mood lifting colouring with updated design details in this tunic top, fresh from sepia's design studio, is the season's summer essential. Style this with form fitting jeggings and ballet flats for a sweet, girly vibe. For a vintage feel throw on a faded and worn denim jacket, jeans and a floral scarf. Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
